asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: An exceptionally polished, narrated explainer video demonstrating the collaborative investment workflow with AI agents, version control, and proposal reviews in NodeRoom.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly demonstrates the proposal-review mechanism and version history features.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full cycle from agent draft to user approval and final version tracking.

visualDesign.evidence: High-quality dark mode UI with smooth transitions and clear focal highlights.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, notes, and agent traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Looks like a real, high-fidelity product interface rather than a conceptual mockup.

legibility.evidence: Most text and numbers are readable, though some smaller UI labels require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses high-trust financial workflows, making it highly relevant for target users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the distinction between AI suggestions and human-in-the-loop approvals.

observedEvidence: Narrated audio track explaining the investment committee preparation scenario
Interactive spreadsheet showing live cell updates and version history
Agent chat panel displaying proposal generation and approval states

defects.observed: Slightly abrupt transition during the zoom-in on the spreadsheet import action.
defects.fix: Soften the camera pan or add a brief cross-fade to ease the visual jump.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom enables high-trust investment workflows with versioned spreadsheets and reviewable AI agent proposals.
